# 5D Labs

> 5D Labs is an OpenClaw-first, crypto-first, AI-first startup studio. We build and validate multiple ventures in parallel using autonomous AI agents — transcending the traditional startup model where you bet everything on one idea.

5D Labs leverages OpenClaw (our open-source agent orchestration platform) to run multiple ventures simultaneously. By deploying 13+ specialized AI agents across development, trading, and operations, we find product-market fit faster and cheaper than traditional startups. Founded by Jonathon Fritz — 15+ years shipping production systems across AI, blockchain, and infrastructure.

## Ventures

- [CTO Platform](https://cto.5dlabs.ai): Multi-agent AI engineering platform — 13 specialized agents ship features from PRD to production on self-healing bare metal infrastructure with 60-80% cost savings vs cloud
- [Agentic Trading](https://5dlabs.ai/#ventures): Autonomous agent commerce infrastructure for companies — programmable execution, risk controls, and 24/7 operations across Solana, Base, Near, and Sui DeFi markets
- [OpenClaw Platform](https://github.com/5dlabs/openclaw-platform): Open-source Kubernetes-native agent orchestration — deploy AI agent fleets with a single command via TUI installer, supporting KinD and enterprise EKS with GitOps, NATS messaging, and observability

## Technology

- [OpenClaw](https://github.com/5dlabs): Open-source agent orchestration layer coordinating AI agents across multiple CLIs (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Factory, Gemini), self-healing bare metal Kubernetes, GitHub/Linear integrations, and MCP servers
- [Infrastructure](https://5dlabs.ai/investors): Bare metal Kubernetes on Talos Linux, ArgoCD GitOps, Prometheus/Grafana/Loki observability, OpenBao secret management

## Consulting

- [Consulting Services](https://5dlabs.ai/consulting/): Expert consulting in AI agent systems, blockchain (Solana, Base, Near, Sui, Ethereum), Kubernetes infrastructure, and DevOps — $225/hr, $1,600/day, $3,500/mo retainer (USD)
- [Schedule a Discovery Call](https://cal.com/jonathon-fritz-2uhdqe/discovery): Book a free 30-minute consultation
- [Resume](https://resume.jonathonfritz.com): Professional background and experience

## Opportunities

- [Work With Me](https://5dlabs.ai/opportunities/): Technical co-founder, fractional CTO (negotiable), and senior infrastructure roles — 20+ years, 10,600+ GitHub contributions, SE→CTO in 3 months at Coinmiles, 1B+ daily requests at Pocket Network; full engagement types and case studies on the opportunities page
